description: This Java class 'NotificationService' handles orchestrating notifications related to business loan application events such as submissions and decisions. It manages sending emails and SMS messages through provider interfaces, with configuration options for enabling/disabling notifications and defining officer contact details. It also includes methods for building notification messages and robust error handling to ensure that failures in notification delivery do not impact the core application workflow.

classes.name: NotificationService
classes.description: A service class that manages the process of sending notifications (emails/SMS) for key business events related to business loans.

methods.name: onApplicationSubmitted
methods.description: Handles notifications triggered upon submission of a business loan application.

methods.name: onDecisionProduced
methods.description: Handles notifications triggered when an automated decision is produced on an application.

methods.name: onDecisionOverridden
methods.description: Handles notifications when a decision is overridden by an officer.

methods.name: sendBestEffort
methods.description: Attempts to send notifications via email and SMS, with error handling and fallback logic, respecting the notification configuration.

methods.name: buildSubmissionBody
methods.description: Constructs the notification message body for application submissions.

methods.name: buildDecisionBody
methods.description: Constructs the notification message body for decision-related events, including decision reasons and timestamps.

methods.name: safe
methods.description: Returns a non-null, trimmed version of a string; defaults to empty string if null.

methods.name: truncate
methods.description: Shortens a string to a maximum length, appending '...' if truncated.
